violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the walk in cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

The floors especially beneath market shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
